CVE-2019-25085.title: A vulnerability was found in GNOME gvdb. It has been classified a ...
CVE-2019-25085.summary: A vulnerability was found in GNOME gvdb. It has been classified as critical. This affects the function gvdb_table_write_contents_async of the file gvdb-builder.c. The manipulation leads to use after free. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The name of the patch is d83587b2a364eb9a9a53be7e6a708074e252de14. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The identifier VDB-216789 was assigned to this vulnerability.

CVE-2021-45085.title: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x be ...
CVE-2021-45085.summary: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x before 41.1 via an about: page, as demonstrated by ephy-about:overview when a user visits an XSS payload page often enough to place that page on the Most Visited list.

CVE-2021-45086.title: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x be ...
CVE-2021-45086.summary: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x before 41.1 because a server's suggested_filename is used as the pdf_name value in PDF.js.

CVE-2021-45087.title: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x be ...
CVE-2021-45087.summary: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x before 41.1 when View Source mode or Reader mode is used, as demonstrated by a a page title.

CVE-2021-45088.title: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x be ...
CVE-2021-45088.summary: XSS can occur in GNOME Web (aka Epiphany) before 40.4 and 41.x before 41.1 via an error page.

CVE-2022-29536.title: In GNOME Epiphany before 41.4 and 42.x before 42.2, an HTML docum ...
CVE-2022-29536.summary: In GNOME Epiphany before 41.4 and 42.x before 42.2, an HTML document can trigger a client buffer overflow (in ephy_string_shorten in the UI process) via a long page title. The issue occurs because the number of bytes for a UTF-8 ellipsis character is not properly considered.

CVE-2023-26081.title: In Epiphany (aka GNOME Web) through 43.0, untrusted web content c ...
CVE-2023-26081.summary: In Epiphany (aka GNOME Web) through 43.0, untrusted web content can trick users into exfiltrating passwords, because autofill occurs in sandboxed contexts.
